title: mazus pumilus var. delavayi
intro: Mazus pumilus var. delavayi, also known as the Chinese Mazus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Mazaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mazus pumilus var. delavayi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
